recover.title: Account Recovery
recover.step1_desc: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a recovery code.
recover.step2_desc: We've sent an email to your address. If you received an 8-digit code, enter it below. If you received a link, please click it to continue.
recover.success_desc: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now login with your new password.
recover.errorExpired: Your recovery code has expired. Please request a new one.
recover.errorToken: Token expired. Please request a new one.

legal.p1_content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, generate invoices, or communicate with support. This includes your name, email address, company details, and business information required for invoicing.
legal.p2_content: We use the information we collect to operate, maintain, and provide the features of the Yuvr's Invoicing platform. This includes generating professional PDF invoices, managing your client data, and automating your billing workflows.
legal.p3_content: Your data is securely stored using Supabase and encrypted where necessary. We implement professional security standards to protect your sensitive business information from unauthorized access or disclosure.
legal.p4_content: We may share information with third-party service providers like Vercel (hosting) and Supabase (database) to provide our services. We do not sell your personal or business data to third parties.
legal.contact_text: If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us at
legal.t1_content: By using the Yuvr's Invoicing platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
legal.t2_content: You must provide accurate and complete information when registering for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password and for all activities that occur under your account.
legal.t3_content: You are responsible for the content of the invoices you generate. You must comply with all applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction regarding invoicing, taxation, and financial reporting.
legal.t4_content: If you choose a paid subscription plan, you agree to pay all fees associated with that plan. Fees are non-refundable except where required by law.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: We're here to help you professionalize your business.
contact.global_desc: Our team is distributed across the globe.
